belier.intro: The Moon advances to 23 degrees Cancer, still in your fourth house of home, its light barely returned at 0.1 percent illumination, the New Moon's darkness lingering one more day before any visible growth begins. The Sun follows close behind at 21 degrees, and this quiet continuation asks you to keep tending yesterday's intention rather than rushing into action. The seed is planted; do not dig it up to check on it.
belier.love: Yesterday's quiet hope about home or emotional security deserves one more day of gentle protection before you speak it aloud. Patience with the process is itself an act of care.
belier.work: If a new intention about your home life or a domestic project began forming yesterday, let it continue settling today rather than forcing the first visible step. Trust the timing you cannot yet see.
belier.energy: Your fire remains low and steady today, still gathering rather than spending. This is the last day of true rest before the coming light begins to build.
belier.intuition: The quiet knowing from yesterday continues to clarify slightly today, though it remains mostly wordless. Protect it from too much analysis; let it grow at its own pace.
belier.mantra: I protect my new intention while it is still fragile.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon moves to 23 degrees Cancer in your third house of communication, its light still just 0.1 percent illuminated, the darkest point of the month lingering into a second day. The Sun advances to 21 degrees close behind it, and this continued stillness asks you to keep your new intention about self-expression private a while longer. What was planted yesterday needs one more quiet day before it can bear speaking.
taureau.love: A tender new way of communicating with someone you love is still forming; resist the urge to test it in conversation just yet. Let it settle fully first.
taureau.work: A new idea for how you communicate professionally, a pitch, a newsletter, a way of framing your work, continues to take shape privately today. Give it one more day before sharing.
taureau.energy: Your steady earth energy remains in its deepest rest today, appropriately so. Let stillness continue to feel sufficient rather than searching for productivity.
taureau.intuition: Yesterday's quiet insight about your voice continues clarifying today, still soft around the edges. Trust the process without rushing it toward words.
taureau.mantra: I let my new voice finish forming before I use it.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon advances to 23 degrees Cancer in your second house of resources, its light still nearly nonexistent at 0.1 percent illumination, one day past the New Moon's exact darkness. The Sun follows at 21 degrees, and this lingering stillness asks you to continue protecting yesterday's quiet intention about your own worth. Let the seed remain undisturbed a little longer.
gemeaux.love: A gentle new understanding of what you deserve in your closest relationships continues settling today. There is still no need to prove or explain it; let it simply exist.
gemeaux.work: Yesterday's private thought about money or professional value deserves one more day of quiet before any action follows. Trust that patience now serves clarity later.
gemeaux.energy: Your usual quickness remains softened today, still in the deep rest this lunar phase calls for. Let this final quiet day be genuinely restful rather than restless.
gemeaux.intuition: The subtle new understanding of your own worth from yesterday continues to take shape today, still mostly unspoken. Trust its quiet growth.
gemeaux.mantra: I let my sense of worth continue growing quietly.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon moves to 23 degrees in your own sign, still in your first house of self, its light just 0.1 percent illuminated one day after the exact New Moon conjunction with your Sun, now at 21 degrees. This is the quiet second day of a genuinely significant beginning, the seed still resting beneath the surface where you planted it yesterday. Mercury's retrograde in your sign continues to favor private clarity over public declaration.
cancer.love: The deep, private intention about who you want to become in love continues settling today, still best kept close rather than spoken. Let one more day of quiet strengthen its roots.
cancer.work: Resist the pull to act on yesterday's ambition just yet; Mercury retrograde asks for one more day of internal clarity before anything is announced. The waiting itself is productive.
cancer.energy: You remain in the deepest, most significant rest of your year, one more day of gestation following this potent New Moon in your own sign. Trust that stillness now fuels real momentum later.
cancer.intuition: The profound intuitive clarity of yesterday's New Moon continues to settle and deepen today. Whatever you sensed about your own becoming remains true and worth protecting a while longer.
cancer.mantra: I let my new beginning root fully before it shows.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon advances to 23 degrees Cancer in your twelfth house of solitude, its light still barely present at 0.1 percent illumination, one day past the New Moon's darkest point. The Sun follows at 21 degrees, and this continued quiet asks you to honor one more day of genuine withdrawal before your natural radiance begins its return. The private intention planted yesterday still needs darkness to take hold.
lion.love: A private hope about emotional healing continues forming today, unspoken and unhurried. Let a partner's patience with your quiet be received as the gift it is.
lion.work: Continue resisting visible action today; the deeper purpose you began sensing yesterday needs one more day of privacy before it can be expressed. Trust the timing.
lion.energy: Your light remains at its faintest today, the last day of this necessary eclipse before your natural brightness begins to return. Rest without impatience.
lion.intuition: Yesterday's wordless sense of what to release or begin continues clarifying quietly today. Do not rush it into language; let it remain a feeling a little longer.
lion.mantra: I let my light return in its own time.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon moves to 23 degrees Cancer in your eleventh house of community, its light still just 0.1 percent illuminated, a second quiet day following the exact New Moon. The Sun advances to 21 degrees, and Mercury continues retrograde in this same sector, extending the case for privacy around yesterday's new hope for friendship or collective belonging. Let the seed remain unspoken a little longer.
vierge.love: A quiet hope about the support you want from those closest to you, partner included, continues settling today. There is still no need to ask for it aloud.
vierge.work: A private intention about a collaborative goal continues taking shape today; Mercury retrograde still favors patience over any public move. Let clarity build before you act.
vierge.energy: Your usual precision can rest one more day; this lingering stillness still calls for quiet rather than refinement. Trust that rest is doing its own kind of work.
vierge.intuition: Yesterday's subtle new hope about belonging continues clarifying today, still soft at the edges. Protect it from premature explanation.
vierge.mantra: I let a new sense of belonging finish taking root.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon advances to 23 degrees Cancer in your tenth house of career, its light still nearly absent at 0.1 percent illumination, one day past the exact New Moon. The Sun follows at 21 degrees, extending this quiet, significant beginning for your professional direction into a second protected day. Continue setting intention rather than taking visible steps; the seed still needs darkness.
balance.love: A partner's quiet support for your still-forming new direction continues to matter more than explanation today. Let their patience be met with your own trust in the timing.
balance.work: Yesterday's private career intention deserves one more day of quiet incubation before any public step. Write down what continues to clarify, but hold your action a little longer.
balance.energy: Your usual poise remains gently turned inward today, the final stretch of this necessary stillness. Trust that rest now prepares real momentum soon.
balance.intuition: The quiet new sense of direction from yesterday continues to take clearer shape today, though still mostly private. Trust its growth without rushing toward certainty.
balance.mantra: I let my direction clarify before I announce it.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon moves to 23 degrees Cancer in your ninth house of belief, its light still just 0.1 percent illuminated, one day past the New Moon's exact darkness. The Sun advances to 21 degrees, and this continued quiet extends yesterday's seed of new philosophy or direction into a second protected day. Let conviction continue forming without needing to be proven yet.
scorpion.love: A quiet new understanding about what love should feel like continues settling today, still private and unrehearsed. There is no urgency to share it.
scorpion.work: An intention about learning, publishing, or a longer journey continues to take shape today; hold off on any concrete step until the idea feels fully rooted.
scorpion.energy: Your usual intensity remains gently contained today, the last quiet stretch before it naturally begins to build again. Trust the stillness.
scorpion.intuition: Yesterday's soft new conviction continues clarifying today, still not ready for argument or explanation. Protect it a little longer.
scorpion.mantra: I let my new belief finish forming in silence.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon advances to 23 degrees Cancer in your eighth house of intimacy, its light still barely present at 0.1 percent illumination, a second quiet day following the exact New Moon. The Sun follows at 21 degrees, extending yesterday's private intention around trust and shared resources into one more protected day. Let it continue settling before you bring it into conversation.
sagittaire.love: A tender new intention about the intimacy you want to build continues forming today, still best kept close. Let a partner's patience meet your own continued quiet.
sagittaire.work: A shared financial matter still benefits from private reflection today rather than negotiation. Hold your position a little longer before bringing it forward.
sagittaire.energy: Your usual expansiveness remains quietly contracted today, the final stretch of necessary stillness. Trust that growth is coming, just not yet visible.
sagittaire.intuition: Yesterday's quiet new understanding about trust continues to clarify today, still mostly wordless. Let it keep forming without forcing definition.
sagittaire.mantra: I let trust continue rebuilding in its own time.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon moves to 23 degrees Cancer in your seventh house of partnership, its light still just 0.1 percent illuminated, one day past the exact New Moon opposite your sign. The Sun advances to 21 degrees, extending yesterday's quiet beginning for a close relationship into a second protected day. Continue holding the intention privately rather than bringing it to the table yet.
capricorne.love: A private hope about the next chapter of a close bond continues taking root today. There is still no need to declare it; let your own certainty deepen first.
capricorne.work: A partnership matter still benefits from quiet reflection today rather than direct conversation. Let clarity build a little further before you speak.
capricorne.energy: Your usual discipline can rest one more day; receptivity still matters more than structure right now. Trust the stillness a little longer.
capricorne.intuition: Yesterday's quiet understanding about what you want from a close bond continues clarifying today, still soft and wordless. Protect it from premature action.
capricorne.mantra: I let this new chapter finish forming before I begin it.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon advances to 23 degrees Cancer in your sixth house of routine, its light still nearly nonexistent at 0.1 percent illumination, one day past the New Moon, while Pluto retrograde continues its long work within your own sign. The Sun follows at 21 degrees, extending yesterday's quiet intention about habit and wellbeing into a second protected day. Let the seed remain undisturbed a little longer.
verseau.love: A quiet intention about shared daily rhythm continues settling today, still unspoken. Let small, simple presence be enough for now.
verseau.work: A new habit or routine you began setting intention around yesterday continues forming privately today. Hold off on launching it publicly just one more day.
verseau.energy: Your usual mental restlessness remains softened today, the final stretch of necessary stillness. Trust that Pluto's quiet restructuring continues even where you cannot see it.
verseau.intuition: Yesterday's quiet understanding about what your body and life actually need continues clarifying today. Trust it fully, even in its continued softness.
verseau.mantra: I let my new rhythm settle fully before I live it.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon moves to 23 degrees Cancer in your fifth house of creativity, its light still just 0.1 percent illuminated, a second quiet day following the exact New Moon in this deeply fertile placement for your imagination. The Sun advances to 21 degrees, extending yesterday's tender seed of romance or creative inspiration into one more protected day of darkness. Let wonder continue without needing form yet.
poissons.love: A tender private hope about romance or creative connection continues to settle today, still just a feeling rather than a plan. Let it remain that way a little longer.
poissons.work: A creative project still benefits from private incubation today rather than any attempt to share it. Trust that a little more darkness will only make it stronger.
poissons.energy: Your natural sensitivity continues its rare harmony with this lingering lunar darkness today. Let yourself keep dreaming without demanding clarity yet.
poissons.intuition: Yesterday's genuinely new intuitive understanding continues forming quietly today, still beneath conscious thought. Trust it completely, even in silence.
poissons.mantra: I let my imagination finish taking root in the dark.
poissons.author: Sibylle
